blockers.reason: Plan 003 cannot execute the 12 genuine BranchRuns because the accepted Plan 002 ForkPoint restore is not branch-ready: live restore inspection shows missing HUD server files and a non-passing trusted grader state (`query.py IndentationError`). Plan 003 also still needs a repo-owned live BranchGateway adapter and a supported HUD QA classifier that returns authoritative reward-hacking verdicts joined to the same BranchRun trace/action digest.

notes: Plan 003 implementation has started but is not complete; no 12-branch run, QA classification, Witness promotion, or replay seal is claimed.
